C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\build_clusters.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\build_clusters.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\build_clusters.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG -s -static -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\build_clusters.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o build_clusters.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libbuild_clusters.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\build_clusters.dir\linkLibs.rsp
